reviews.text: Not enough words to describe how AMAZING Carissa is! Ever since our first chat, it was so easy to connect with her and build a friendship. She’s very detailed, helpful and her photography style is beautiful (our family and friends can’t believe the pictures are real!). I look back at the photos and feel like it’s my wedding day all over again. It was truly an unforgettable experience and I couldn’t imagine anyone else capturing it ALL!

Carissa was the perfect elopement photographer! She was able to capture shots of our day that make it feel like time froze. I could easily relive these moments over and over. She also was wonderful at helping in choosing the most stunning locations for our trip and creating the perfect timeline for our special day. Not only is she amazing behind the camera but she also has the most down to earth personality. Her personality is what sets her apart from others. She honestly is so excited to make your day special and wants it to go as smoothly as planned. She will do whatever it takes to get the shot and is so happy to do it!

My husband and I were initially unfamiliar with the elopement process and didn't know exactly what to expect. But after our first Zoom call with Carissa, we immediately knew we had made the right choice. We had a few more meetings with her leading up to the big day where she helped us make a plan that fit our personalities and fine-tune the details, and her warmth, professionalism, and attention to detail put us at ease. When we finally met in person on our wedding day, it felt like we were reconnecting with an old friend.

Carissa is kind, fun, and incredibly knowledgeable. She truly brought our vision for our elopement to life, capturing so many special moments that we will cherish forever. The photos are stunning—each one looks like it belongs in a wedding magazine. Now, we are having a tough time deciding which ones to frame because they are all so incredible!

We cannot recommend Carissa enough. She beyond exceeded our expectations and made our day even more magical and memorable, and we will treasure her work for a lifetime. If you are looking for a talented and genuinely wonderful photographer to make your wedding day extra special, choose Carissa. You won’t regret it!

Carissa, is everything you could possibly ask for for your elopement experience. She makes the planning process easy and intuitive while providing a caring, hands-on approach from the first email response all the way up to the day of the wedding. She was so eager to accommodate anywhere that she was able to, and allowed us to feel like we were in the driver's seat while providing her immense expertise throughout.

In addition to being an incredible photographer and professional, Carissa prioritized our experience on the day above everything else. Thanks to Carissa's detailed approach to planning the day, we were able to truly enjoy ourselves. It did not feel like a rigid photo shoot, but instead got to be the private intimate moment we wanted while she captured every feeling and detail of it with the most stunning photography I have ever seen. As one of the lucky couples who is featured in some of the photography on Carissa's website, we can testify that we experience felt just as magical as it looks.

Our wildest imagination still paled in comparison to what the end result was. We could not recommend Carissa enough. If you are even considering eloping, Carissa should be your only choice.

Carissa is so incredibly talented I cannot say enough about her and the entire process start to finish. My husband and I decided very last minute that we wanted to elope, but we didn’t want to sacrifice having beautiful photos.

We got SO LUCKY and were able to book Carissa for her last available spot for 2024, with only about a 2 months notice. As soon as I got on the initial call with her, I knew she was the one to handle this. She is so personable, really got to understand us as a couple, and our vision. I am the world’s worst planner, I honestly didn’t even know where to begin, but she made the process so easy from start to finish.

Carissa brought our vision to life and gave us everything we wanted. She is someone who loves what she does and it shows in the way she carries her business and in her photos. The amount of people who have told me our photos deserve to be in Vogue is insane and I can’t say I disagree LOL. They are everything we hoped for and more.

Carissa is overall amazing - talented, sweet, makes you feel like a friend, helps you plan the day and gives great inspiration, and she’s so quick when delivering the photos. Which I totally appreciated because I just wanted to stare at them as soon as we got done. You cannot go wrong with this gal!!!! The photos speak for themselves!!!!
